tweets.text:
🚨 5/24/2026 Illegal Alien Crimes Roundup - It's been two weeks since the last roundup.

⬇️ Here's a rundown on 25 of the cases that have come to light - I will post links to them in replies.

1. Montgomery County, VA: Man on detainer arrested for strong-arm rape

2. Los Angeles County, CA: Illegal alien used nephew, disabled niece for child porn

3. Miami-Dade County, FL:  Man on detainer gave 14-year-old STD

4. Travis County, TX: 2-of-3 arrested for shooting spree IDed as illegal aliens

5. Broward County, FL: Man on detainer arrested for double shooting

6. Greene County, MO: Illegal alien accused of fathering child with 12-year-old

7. Davidson County, TN: Man on detainer arrested for attempted murder

8. San Joaquin County, CA: Illegal alien truck driver accused of killing two

9. Chatham County, NC: Man on detainer accused of kidnapping, raping 13-year-old

10. Harris County, TX: Man on detainer arrested for double murder

11. Hillsborough County, FL: Man on detainer arrested for sex crimes

12. Marion County, IN: Man on detainer arrested for fatal crash

13. Maricopa County, AZ: Illegal alien arrested for crash that killed daughter

14. Atlantic County, NJ: Illegal alien arrested for fatal shooting

15. Franklin County, VA: Illegal alien arrested for rape and child porn

16. Mecklenburg County, NC: Man on detainer arrested for murder of baby

17. Fresno County, CA: Illegal alien arrested for 4-year-old's hit-and-run

18. Martin County, FL: Illegal alien arrested for sex assault of 12-year-old

19. Travis and Bastrop County, TX: Illegal alien arrested for women's murders

20. Monmouth County, NJ: Man on detainer arrested for violent carjacking

21. Nassau County, NY: Illegal alien arrested for series of arson fires

22. Dallas County, TX: Two illegal alien arrested for murder of unborn child

23. Broward County, FL: Woman on detainer arrested for crash that killed two

24. St. Louis County, MO: Two illegal aliens arrested for baby's torture

25. Tulsa County, OK: Man on detainer accused of using car as weapon

author.description: News on illegal alien crime and laws concerning their identification. Posts may highlight immigration detainers, detainers do not guarantee illegal status.
